homepage.heroSubline: Fast-response towing services when you need it most. Serving Tulsa and surrounding areas with 24/7 availability.
aboutText: Onyx Towing started with a single truck and a commitment to honest service. After helping stranded motorists during the 2012 Tulsa ice storms, we knew this community deserved better roadside assistance.
We invest in late-model tow trucks with proper Tulsa-specific equipment - from wheel lifts for downtown tight spaces to heavy-duty rigs for Route 66 breakdowns.
Our team lives right here in Tulsa neighborhoods. When we're not working, you'll find us at Cherry Street festivals or supporting local schools.

valueProps.title: 15-Minute Average Response
valueProps.description: Dispatchers track all available units in real-time across Tulsa's grid system.

valueProps.title: Tulsa-Trained Operators
valueProps.description: Every driver completes 40 hours of local training - from Brookside's narrow streets to I-44 construction zones.

valueProps.title: No Hidden Fees
valueProps.description: Upfront pricing that accounts for Tulsa's terrain and traffic patterns.

valueProps.title: Local Partnerships
valueProps.description: Preferred rates at Tulsa repair shops we've vetted personally.

homepage.ctaSubline: Call 555-TOW-R93 for immediate dispatch. We'll text you our ETA and driver details.

services.name: Emergency Towing
services.shortDescription: 24/7 rapid response when your vehicle won't move.
services.description:
When your car dies on the Broken Arrow Expressway or won't start after a Tulsa Drillers game, we're the team that comes running. Our emergency dispatch prioritizes safety - we'll secure the scene with proper lighting and traffic cones before hooking up.

All trucks carry Tulsa-specific gear like ice melt for winter breakdowns and sun shades for summer rescues. We know every on-ramp and shoulder from the IDL to 71st Street, so help arrives faster.

Unlike national chains, our drivers actually live in Tulsa neighborhoods. They'll recommend trustworthy local mechanics and warn you about shops with predatory practices near the fairgrounds.
process: Step 1: Call our Tulsa-based dispatcher with your exact location and vehicle details
Step 2: Receive text confirmation with driver photo, truck number, and live ETA
Step 3: Driver secures scene with proper safety equipment for Tulsa road conditions
Step 4: Transparent pricing review before hookup, with options for preferred shops
benefits: Average 15-minute response in Tulsa proper
Drivers carry Tulsa street maps as backup to GPS
No surprise fees for downtown or Riverside areas
Can arrange rides home to any Tulsa neighborhood

faq.question: What if I break down in a dangerous spot like the I-244 interchange?
faq.answer: Our trucks have flashing arrow boards and we coordinate with Tulsa PD when needed. Drivers are trained specifically for high-traffic areas like the IDL and Harvard Ave merge points.

faq.question: Do you tow all vehicle types in Tulsa?
faq.answer: From compact cars parked too close in Brady District to lifted trucks stuck in Turkey Mountain mud - we've got the right equipment. Specialized units available for electric vehicles and classic cars.

services.name: Roadside Assistance
services.shortDescription: Jump starts, lockouts, and tire changes across Tulsa County.
services.description:
Tulsa's sudden weather changes can strand anyone - a dead battery after a freezing night in Maple Ridge or keys locked in a sweltering car at Woodland Hills Mall. Our roadside team carries more supplies than national providers because we know local needs.

Every truck stocks Tulsa-specific items: heavy-duty jumper cables for truck batteries at Port of Catoosa, lockout tools that won't damage newer Hyundai models from the local plant, and even pet restraints for rescued animals during summer heat waves.

We don't just fix the problem - we'll explain how to prevent repeat issues in Tulsa's climate. Our team can test alternators draining batteries during stop-and-go traffic on Peoria Avenue or recommend the best winter tires for Jenks hill roads.
process: Step 1: Describe your exact situation to our Tulsa call center
Step 2: Verify your location using nearby landmarks (churches, stores, Tulsa murals)
Step 3: Receive transparent pricing before dispatch
Step 4: Get text updates as your technician navigates Tulsa traffic
benefits: Most calls completed in under 30 minutes
Technicians carry Tulsa bus passes if you need alternate transport
Free battery terminal cleaning to prevent future corrosion
Can bill most Tulsa-area insurance providers directly

faq.question: What's your service radius for roadside help?
faq.answer: We cover all of Tulsa County with priority response inside city limits. Rural areas like Sperry may have slightly longer wait times during peak demand.

faq.question: Can you help if I locked my keys in a running car?
faq.answer: Yes - our Tulsa team carries specialized tools to safely shut off engines without damage, especially important with newer push-start vehicles common in midtown neighborhoods.

services.name: Motorcycle Towing
services.shortDescription: Specialized transport for bikes with proper tie-downs.
services.description:
Tulsa's motorcycle culture deserves better than standard tow services. Whether your Harley won't start after Bike Night at Cain's Ballroom or you went down on the curves near Chandler Park, we transport bikes properly.

Our Tulsa-specific motorcycle rigs feature:
- Soft straps that won't scratch chrome on Route 66 rides
- Wheel chocks sized for everything from sport bikes to trikes
- Weatherproof covers for sudden Tulsa thunderstorms

We know all the best Tulsa-area shops for bike repairs - from vintage British cycles at Blue Moon Cycles to performance metrics at MotoWorks. Need to store your bike temporarily? We partner with secure Tulsa storage facilities that offer climate-controlled options.
process: Step 1: Tell us your bike's make/model and breakdown location
Step 2: Choose between our enclosed trailer or flatbed options
Step 3: Watch via text as your bike is secured with photos at each step
Step 4: Receive digital documentation of transport conditions
benefits: Operators trained by Tulsa motorcycle enthusiasts
Can arrange pickup from St. Francis or Hillcrest emergency rooms
Special weekend/holiday rates for rally transport
Will remove personal items from saddlebags upon request

faq.question: Do you transport bikes to Tulsa bike nights or events?
faq.answer: Absolutely - we provide scheduled transport to events like the Brady District Bike Night or Route 66 Rally. Advance booking recommended for these popular dates.

faq.question: What if my bike is blocking traffic on a busy Tulsa street?
faq.answer: Our drivers carry traffic control equipment and will coordinate with Tulsa PD if needed to secure the scene quickly, especially important on narrow streets like Brookside or near TU campus.

services.name: Heavy Duty Towing
services.shortDescription: Commercial and industrial towing for Tulsa businesses.
services.description:
When a semi jackknifes on the BA Expressway or construction equipment gets stuck at a Tulsa job site, standard tow trucks won't cut it. Our heavy-duty division handles everything from loaded flatbeds to port machinery with proper Tulsa-specific equipment.

We maintain specialized rigs for:
- Oil field equipment transport across Tulsa County
- Tractor recovery from muddy rural properties
- Oversized load escorts through Tulsa's historic districts

Our team understands Tulsa's commercial vehicle laws and weight restrictions on bridges like the 11th Street Arkansas River crossing. We'll help navigate permits when needed and coordinate with Tulsa Port Authority for industrial clients.
process: Step 1: Provide vehicle specs and exact location details
Step 2: Receive confirmation with equipment type and ETA
Step 3: On-site assessment by certified heavy equipment operator
Step 4: Detailed documentation for insurance claims
benefits: 60-ton capacity for most Tulsa-area needs
Familiar with all Tulsa industrial zones and ports
Can arrange after-hours service for minimum road disruption
Provides DOT-compliant paperwork for commercial clients

faq.question: Can you handle RV retrievals from Tulsa campgrounds?
faq.answer: Yes - we frequently service areas like Lake Eufaula and Keystone Lake with equipment sized for large recreational vehicles. Special care taken with slide-outs and attached items.

faq.question: What's your response time for commercial clients?
faq.answer: Priority dispatch available for contracted Tulsa businesses, with most heavy-duty calls responded to within 90 minutes depending on equipment needs and location.

services.name: Private Property Towing
services.shortDescription: Authorized vehicle removal for Tulsa property managers.
services.description:
Tulsa apartment complexes and shopping centers need reliable unauthorized vehicle removal without damaging property. Our private property towing follows all Oklahoma statutes while keeping your Tulsa lot clear.

We specialize in:
- College housing near TU and OSU-Tulsa with proper student notifications
- Downtown Tulsa parking enforcement without damaging brick streets
- Shopping center management at places like Woodland Hills and Promenade Mall

Every tow is documented with timestamped photos showing the violation (blocking dumpsters, parking in reserved spots, etc.). Our Tulsa drivers know how to maneuver large trucks through tight apartment complexes without disturbing residents.
process: Step 1: Submit signed authorization form for your Tulsa property
Step 2: Provide specific violation details and vehicle location
Step 3: Our driver verifies signage and violation before hookup
Step 4: Secure transport to our Tulsa storage lot with proper documentation
benefits: Fully licensed for Oklahoma private property towing
Online portal for Tulsa property managers to track removals
Can provide custom signage meeting Tulsa municipal codes
24/7 availability for emergency violations

faq.question: How quickly can you remove an abandoned vehicle in Tulsa?
faq.answer: Most authorized removals occur within 2 hours during business days. After-hours service available for safety hazards with additional documentation.

faq.question: Do you handle Tulsa street parking violations?
faq.answer: Only on private property - for city street violations, contact Tulsa Parking Authority. We can assist businesses with proper documentation for parking lot enforcement.

reviews.name: Marcus W.
reviews.text: These guys saved me when my alternator died during rush hour on the IDL. Driver knew exactly how to position the truck to avoid blocking more lanes. Had me towed to a honest mechanic on Admiral instead of some overpriced downtown shop. Even gave me a ride home to Kendall Whittier.

reviews.name: Jasmine R.
reviews.text: Locked my keys in my running Kia at Turkey Mountain trailhead on a 100° day. Onyx had someone there in 25 minutes with the right tools to pop the lock without damage. Technician noticed my battery terminals were corroded and cleaned them up for free - said Tulsa's humidity causes that a lot.

reviews.name: Derrick S.
reviews.text: Crashed my Harley near Chandler Park after hitting gravel. Onyx's bike specialist arrived quickly, knew how to lift it without scratching the custom paint, and recommended a great Tulsa shop for the repairs. Even called next day to check on me. These guys actually ride themselves - you can tell.

reviews.name: Tulsa Storage Co.
reviews.text: We've used Onyx for 3 years at our midtown storage facility. Their drivers document every unauthorized vehicle perfectly and know how to maneuver our tight lot. Never had a single complaint about damage - unlike our previous provider. Their online tracking system saves us hours of paperwork.

reviews.name: Lena P.
reviews.text: Our food truck broke down blocking a lane on Cherry Street during Mayfest. Onyx had a heavy-duty wrecker there in 40 minutes that could handle our 26-footer without unloading. Driver worked with event staff to minimize disruption and got us to our shop without spilling any of the cooking oil.

reviews.name: Carlos M.
reviews.text: Hit black ice on Yale Ave and ended up in a ditch at 2 AM. Onyx's driver brought blankets and made sure I was okay before even hooking up the car. Knew exactly which Tulsa body shops would still be open and helped me call my insurance. True lifesavers during that freeze last January.

serviceAreas.content: Onyx Towing is proud to serve the Tulsa community with reliable and professional towing services. Whether you're stranded on the busy streets of downtown Tulsa or need roadside assistance near the Arkansas River, our team is available 24/7 to help. We specialize in light-duty towing, emergency jump-starts, and tire changes, ensuring you get back on the road quickly and safely.
serviceAreas.localContext: Tulsa, known for its vibrant arts scene and historic Route 66 landmarks, is a bustling urban hub.

Whether you're near the Bass Pro Shops or the Broken Arrow Events Park, our team is equipped to handle vehicle recoveries, lockouts, and more. We prioritize quick response times to minimize your stress during emergencies.
